description: future projection based on MPI-ESM-LR CMIP5 Earth System Model r1i1p1 climate signal under the RCP8.5 scenario (CMIP5-era [2006-2100] forcing) added to the ECMWF ERA-Interim reanalysis to create a pseudo global warming (PGW) scenario
experiment: future projection based on MPI-ESM-LR CMIP5 Earth System Model r1i1p1 climate signal under the RCP8.5 scenario (CMIP5-era [2006-2100] forcing) added to the ECMWF ERA-Interim reanalysis to create a pseudo global warming (PGW) scenario
